name: streaming-media-engineering
description: Streaming-media (audio/video) delivery engineering team — 2 agents (streaming-media-architect, media-pipeline-engineer) for the layer that MOVES media to players at scale: live-vs-VOD and the latency tier (broadcast/low/ultra-low), protocol & packaging selection (HLS/LL-HLS/DASH/CMAF, WebRTC/WHIP/WHEP), the codec & bitrate ladder (H.264/HEVC/AV1, per-title/ABR), DRM (Widevine/FairPlay/PlayReady + multi-DRM/CMAF-CBCS), CDN/multi-CDN & origin, and QoE (startup time, rebuffer ratio, player analytics). 3 skills (design-streaming-delivery, build-transcode-ladder, diagnose-playback-qoe), a knowledge bank (a Mermaid latency-tier->protocol tree + a DRM/packaging matrix + a dated 2026 codec/protocol/CDN reference), 7 best-practices. Distinct from data-streaming-engineering (Kafka/Flink data streams), film-video-production (content creation), and frontend-engineering (player UI). Seams: finops-cloud-cost (egress/CDN spend), computer-vision-engineering (frame analysis). Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
